entry: TBD — waiting for M15 retracement into bearish OB during NY AM Kill Zone (08:30-11:00 NY)

three_layer_analysis.l1_daily: D1 bias shifted bearish. Today (Jun 23) massive reversal: O:30,370.8 → C:29,524.3 (-846.5pts). Broke below Monday low (30,051.2). D1 structure was HH+HL from Jun 12→16 but Jun 17 broke with LH+LL. Jun 18 recovered HH+HL, Jun 19 LH+HL, Jun 22 HH+LL. Today threatens LH+LL. Price at 53.5% of D1 dealing range (28,206.1→30,679.6) = just above equilibrium (29,442.9). Bearish marubozu (91.8% body) with 921pt range.
three_layer_analysis.l2_h4_context: H4 showing 4 consecutive bearish candles (Tue 22:00 → now). 3 are bearish marubozu (-193.6, -354.0, -223.2). Price at 2.3% of H4 range = deep discount at the bottom. No H4 bullish OB holding. Next H4 support is the Jun 15-16 expansion FVG zone ~29,000-29,200. CRT defined by Tue 22:00 UTC bar. Price has purged below CRT and continues lower.
three_layer_analysis.l3_m15_entry: M15 selloff showing signs of exhaustion — last 3 bars are smaller range with mixed direction. Low at 29,494.5 at 08:15 NY. Some bullish M15 candles appearing (08:30 +54.4, 09:00 +71.2) but no confirmed bullish displacement or MSS. No Kill Zone active (06:30 NY). WAIT for NY AM KZ (08:30-11:00 NY) for potential retracement into M15 bearish OB (~29,800-29,900 zone) for short entry.

smt_divergence: None detected — both NAS100 and US500 made HL at recent swing lows
weekly_profile: Classic Tuesday High — Monday bullish (+94.5pts), Tuesday reversing below Monday low (swept 30,051.2). This profile typically sees Tuesday set the weekly high followed by bearish continuation Wed-Thu.
reasoning: NAS100 experiencing significant reversal on Jun 23 after a 10-day rally from Jun 9 low (28,206.1) to Jun 22 high (30,679.6). Today's -846pt drop broke Monday's low and H4 structure. D1 structure that was HH+HL is now threatened — today is forming LH+LL which would confirm bearish shift. H4 shows relentless selling with 4 consecutive bearish candles (3 marubozu). M15 showing early exhaustion signs but no reversal confirmation. Key question: is this a healthy retracement to D1 equilibrium (29,443) or a full reversal? Price is right at equilibrium (53.5%) — a bounce from here is technically valid. But the speed and magnitude of selling suggest institutional distribution. Classic Tuesday High profile supports bearish continuation Wed-Thu. Watch 29,494.5 (today's low) — a sweep + reclaim would be bullish SMT signal. Failure to hold opens 29,000-29,200 FVG zone. No entry until M15 shows displacement or NY KZ provides a setup. Confidence at 60 because: (1) broader trend was bullish until today, (2) at D1 equilibrium = natural bounce zone, (3) M15 showing early exhaustion, (4) no SMT divergence to confirm bearish shift.
